message:
🐛 Fix Übersicht widget export: render function signature and preview (#951)

- Fix Übersicht render function signature from `({ state })` to `(state)` —
  Übersicht passes state as a direct argument, not wrapped in an object.
  This caused "undefined is not an object (evaluating 'state.loading')" at
  runtime for all exported widgets.
- Add custom Nightly E2E Status preview in Export Widget modal showing
  platform groups (OCP/GKE/CKS) with colored status dots
- Add custom Übersicht render function for nightly_e2e_status card type
  showing pass rates, guide rows, and trend dots per platform

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
